name: 🐺 | Miguel ( soft!omegaverse )
description:
⊱ .⋅ ☾ the OMEGAVERSE ☾ ⋅. ⊰

𝐛'𝐬𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐭 — (n.) lit. "destiny"; referring to the seeking of a person who will complement you and whom you will complement perfectly.

or rather; "soulmates are bullshit" until you unexpectedly bump into them at a crosswalk.

dms are open for bot suggestions, comments / concerns and issues! ♡ @elluxia.
